data.content: Added max-lines (500), max-lines-per-function (100), max-len (100) ESLint rules to eslint.config.mjs. Refactored 9 view/page components to comply by extracting sub-components and hooks. 30 files changed (13 new extraction files, 9 modified source files, 8 updated tests). All quality gates pass: zero ESLint warnings on target files, typecheck clean, 2239 tests passing, build successful. Branch: worktree-fix+code-style-views-pages, commit: d061ab0190f2.
